name: Amaretto Fruit Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. If using cooked pudding, mix pudding mix with milk and cook over medium heat until thickened. Let cool.
2. If using instant pudding, combine pudding mix with milk and add the rest of the ingredients.
3. Optionally, use up to 1/3 cup of amaretto if desired.
4. Serve with your favorite fruits, such as strawberries, cantaloupe, bananas, pineapple, grapes, peaches, apples, or any other fruit you prefer.
